biotech.title: EEG Stream Visualizer
biotech.summary: A browser-based EEG streaming viewer concept for inspecting traces, event markers, and future spectral overlays in a research-friendly interface.

biotech.title: Gene Expression QC Pipeline
biotech.summary: A reproducible genomics pipeline scaffold for bulk RNA-seq quality control, expression profiling, and downstream reporting.

biotech.title: Live Vision Model Lab
biotech.summary: A real-time browser-based computer vision demo with switchable COCO-SSD, MobileNet, Handpose, and Face API inference.

mlai.title: Protein Signal Classifier
mlai.summary: An experimental ML workflow for classifying signal patterns across biological datasets with emphasis on lightweight inference and interpretable outputs.

mlai.title: Clinical Note Summariser
mlai.summary: A privacy-aware summarisation interface for transforming dense research or healthcare notes into concise structured summaries directly in the browser.

other.title: Pokemon Card Scanner & Deck Valuation
other.summary: A polished client-side scanner and valuation helper for identifying Pokemon cards, estimating deck value, and comparing collection snapshots over time.

other.title: Offline Privacy Workbench
other.summary: A browser-based toolkit exploring what serious client-side software can feel like when privacy, local inference, and offline-first operation are the defaults.

other.title: Research Media Archive
other.summary: A compact media archiving system for linking experiments, visuals, and lab documentation into a cohesive narrative record.

media.title: Monochrome Lab Portrait
media.summary: A quiet portrait study with minimal palette and directional light.

media.title: Field Notes in Motion
media.summary: A short-form reel style sequence balancing travel atmosphere with research textures.

media.title: Coastal Editorial Frame
media.summary: Editorial still with cinematic color treatment and spatial negative space.

media.title: Lab Bench Sequence
media.summary: Textural frames from biotech experimentation and instrumentation details.
